info.title: GigKraft API
info.description: GigKraft backend API (MVP, Phase 1: integrations mocked).

get.description: Liveness check; also reports which integrations are mocked.
Public — returns template profile URLs for both environments.
Detect the caller's ZIP code from their IP address. Cached 24 h per IP.
Return city/state and live pro count for a ZIP — used for clean-URL OG tags.

post.description: Records a visit to a site-config demo/marketing page.
Email/password registration (any role; primary path for node managers).
Email/password login.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.

Request a phone OTP (pros/homeowners).

MOCK (Phase 1): with MOCK_TWILIO=true the code is deterministic and
returned in `dev_code` so local clients can complete the flow.
Verify a phone OTP and sign in (creates the user on first login).
Google Sign-In: verify id_token and return a JWT pair.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile (JWT-protected sample).

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile fields.

post.description: Accept a multipart image upload, save to MEDIA_ROOT, return the public URL.
Download an image URL (e.g. Google photo), save to MEDIA_ROOT, return stable URL.

get.description: Public pro discovery — no auth required, no node scoping.

post.description:
Submit a free-form quote request. Matches pros by category + zip (partial match)
and emails a summary to the GK Admin inbox.

get.description: Return OG-tagged HTML for social crawlers; instantly redirects browsers to the SPA.
Discovery / B2B search (1.13). Filters by node, trade and ZIP.
Public: return the verified Krafts for a pro (shown on public profile).

post.description: Publish the Kraft. Requires ≥1 After photo. Sets status VERIFIED so it appears on the public profile immediately.

Submit a quote request without signing in.

The lead is attributed to a sentinel 'anonymous@gigkraft.internal' user so
it appears in the PRO's inbox labelled 'Anonymous'. The anon user can later
claim the conversation by signing up and linking via the lead ID.
Capture visitor email/phone for a ZIP with no pros yet.

get.description:
Role-aware list: pros see their leads, homeowners/referrers see theirs.

Pass ?sent=true to see threads initiated by the current user (homeowner slot),
regardless of role — powers the Sent tab in both inboxes.

post.description:
Any authenticated user can request a quote.

If the user lacks the homeowner role, it is added to their extra_roles
so they can track their own requests. Enforces § global lead cap.

Start a new direct-message chat thread by addressing a pro @handle.

Any authenticated user (homeowner or pro) can compose. The sender occupies
the homeowner slot; the addressed pro occupies the pro slot. The thread is
classified as thread_type='chat' and appears in the receiver's Chats tab.
Senders can find it in their Sent tab via ?sent=true.

get.description: Poll endpoint: pass ?since=<last message id> for increments.

post.description:
PRO accepts a thread classified as `request`, moving it to active chat.

Until accepted: sender does not receive read receipts (enforced client-side).
Pro sends a quote (or invoice) into the chat.
Homeowner accepts a quote.
Pro marks the job complete.

Reassign an anonymous lead to the authenticated user who just signed up.

Only works when the lead's homeowner is anonymous@gigkraft.internal.
Called after a visitor completes signup following an anonymous quote submission.

get.description: Open (unclaimed) broadcasts a pro can claim.
Poll endpoint for the success state (claim list updates).

post.description: First pro to claim wins: opens a Lead + chat, sets claimed_by.

get.description: Return approved recommendations for a pro's public profile.

post.description: Pro sends a magic review link to a past client (screen 1.7).

get.description: Public: load the review screen context from a magic link (2.5).

post.description: Public: submit stars + text + optional photos via the magic link.

get.description:
Pro's own recommendations; ?status=submitted for the moderation
queue (screen 1.8).

post.description: Pro approves -> the recommendation goes public on the profile.
Merge local-storage favorites into the server's list and return the union.

get.description: Past leads/quotes with invoice amounts (screen 2.6 'Past jobs').

post.description: SMS-pin: mark the emergency as manually routed (removes from queue).
WhatsApp blast: re-dispatch the broadcast to eligible pros (mock).
Start a Stripe Checkout session for a member upgrading or a pro re-subscribing.

delete.description:
Delete the pro's subscription row so the checkout flow can be re-tested.
Only available when Stripe is in test mode.

post.description: Ping Stripe with whichever key matches the current mode.

get.description: Platform-wide inbox overview: all users with conversation activity.
All leads where the given user is a participant (homeowner or pro slot).
All leads captured from anonymous visitors (not yet linked to a real HO account).

post.description: Send or resend a specific sequence step via email or WhatsApp log.
Submit feedback — works for both anonymous and authenticated users.

get.description: List all feedback — gk_admin only.
Return all feedback submitted by the authenticated user.

post.description: Add a reply to a feedback ticket — gk_admin only.

patch.description: Mark a feedback ticket open or resolved — gk_admin only.

get.description: Search for a registered pro by name, email, or phone for circle curation.

post.description: Create the curator's Circle with a user-chosen slug (first-time setup only).

Explicit claim path: authenticated user asserts they are the off-platform
pro who was invited. Supplements the post_save signal (which fires
automatically when ProProfile is created with a matching email).

get.description: Returns whether a given handle/slug is available. Safe path — not a slug param.
Find a pro (or member) by exact phone or email match.

post.description: Legacy batch endpoint — kept for backward compat. New code uses /me/invite-friend-single.

Single friend invite — creates a tracked FriendInvite with a unique token.
Frontend builds the WhatsApp/SMS deep link using the returned token + referrer_slug.

Single recipient circle-share — same shape as invite-friend-single.
The wizard loops this once per recipient for multi-recipient Circle sends.
Auth required. Links the authenticated user to the ProInvite and creates a ProProfile.
Auth required. Auto-follows the referrer and marks the FriendInvite as converted.

get.description: Returns non-archived pro and friend invites for the dashboard.
Per-contact event history powering the Contact Detail Timeline drawer.

post.description: Public. Fire-and-forget — atomically increments click_count.

get.description: Public. Returns context for the claim landing page — used to highlight the right pro card.

post.description: Public. Fire-and-forget — atomically increments click_count.
Public. Fire-and-forget — atomically increments click_count.

ServiceAreaIn.description: Service area (screen 1.2): ZIP list + radius only, no map.
ServiceAreaIn.title: ServiceAreaIn
